---
title: "Main ENSO indices for Pacific Ocean"
description: |
  Updated visualization and extraction of the four main ENSO-related indices | Visualización actualizada y extracción de 4 principales índices relacionados al ENSO
date: 2026-06-18
image: banner.png
about: 
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rectangle
keywords: ["enso", "environmental", "indices", "R", "scripts", "tutorial", "PDO", "ICEN", "MEI", "TPI"]
tags: ["enso", "environmental", "indices", "R", "scripts", "tutorial", "PDO", "ICEN", "MEI", "TPI"]
categories: ["R", "tutorial"]
draft: false
engine: knitr
---

Image credits: MEI index at [NOAA](https://psl.noaa.gov/enso/mei/)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

require(dplyr)
require(tidyr)
require(plotly)
```


Required R packages:
Paquetes de R necesarios: 

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
require(dplyr)
require(tidyr)
require(plotly)
```

## ICEN (Índice Costero El Niño/EL Niño Coastal Index)

Reference: <https://siofen.imarpe.gob.pe/nivel2/indice-costero-el-nino-icen>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="R"}
```{r}
icen <- read.table(
  file = "http://met.igp.gob.pe/datos/ICEN.txt", 
  skip = 5,
  header = FALSE
) |> 
  
  as_tibble() |> 
  
  rename(año = V1, mes = V2, ICEN = V3) |> 
  
  mutate(
    date = paste(año, mes, 1, sep = "-") |> as.Date(),
    ICEN_c = cut(
      x = ICEN,
      breaks = c(-Inf, -1.3, -1.1, -.7, .5, 1.3, 2.1, 3.5, Inf),
      labels = c(
        "Niña Fuerte", "Niña Moderada", "Niña Débil", 
        "Neutro",
        "Niño Débil", "Niño Moderado", "Niño Fuerte", "Niño Extraordinario"
      )
    )
  )
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Data"}
```{r}
#| echo: false

icen |> 
  
  DT::datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print")
    )
  )
```
:::



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| padding: 0px

cols <- setNames(
  object = c(
    "#2e75b5", "#9bc2e6", "#ddebf7",
    "#ffffff",
    "#ffe2dd", "#fdcece", "#ff5d5d", "#e60000"
  ),
  nm = c(
    "Niña Fuerte", "Niña Moderada", "Niña Débil", 
    "Neutro", 
    "Niño Débil", "Niño Moderado", "Niño Fuerte", "Niño Extraordinario"
  )
)

icen |> 
  
  rename(cat = ICEN_c, icen = ICEN) |> 
  
  plot_ly(
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    colors = cols, 
    marker = list(line = list(color = "gray60", width = 1))
  ) |> 
  
  add_lines(
    x = ~date, y = ~icen, name = "ICEN",
    color = I("gray80"), width = 1, 
    hovermode = FALSE
  ) |> 
  
  add_markers(
    x = ~date, y = ~icen, name = "ICEN", 
    text = ~sprintf(
      fmt = "%s\nICEN: %s\nCategor\u00eda: %s",
      format(x = date, format = "%b %Y"),
      icen, cat
    ),
    color = ~cat
  ) |> 
  
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE, 
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      range = c(min(icen$date), Sys.Date())
    ),
    yaxis = list(title = "ICEN", fixedrange = TRUE)
  )
```

## PDO (Pacific Decadal Oscillation)

Reference: <https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/access/monitoring/pdo/>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="R"}
```{r}
pdo <- read.table(
  file = "https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/pub/data/cmb/ersst/v5/v6/index/ersst.v6.pdo.dat",
  skip = 1, header = TRUE
) |> 
  
  as_tibble() |> 
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Year,
    names_to = "mes",
    values_to = "PDO"
  ) |> 
  
  rename(año = Year) |> 
  
  mutate(
    mes = seq(12)[match(x = mes, month.abb)],
    date = paste(año, mes, 1, sep = "-") |> as.Date(),
    PDO_c = cut(
      x = PDO,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 0, Inf),
      labels = c("Frío", "Cálido")
    )
  ) |> 
  
  filter(PDO < 99)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Data"}
```{r}
#| echo: false

pdo |> 
  
  DT::datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print")
    )
  )
```
:::


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| padding: 0px

cols <- setNames(
  object = c("#2e75b5", "#e60000"),
  nm = c("Frío", "Cálido")
)

ylim <- c(
  min(pdo$PDO) |> floor(),
  max(pdo$PDO) |> ceiling()
)

pdo |> 
  
  plot_ly(
    type = "bar",
    colors = cols,
    marker = list(line = list(color = "transparent", width = 0))
  ) |> 
  
  add_bars(
    x = ~date, y = ~PDO, name = "PDO",
    color = ~PDO_c,
    text = ~sprintf(
      fmt = "%s\nPDO: %s\nCategoría: %s",
      format(x = date, format = "%b %Y"),
      PDO, PDO_c
    ),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |> 
  
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    barmode = "relative",
    bargap = 0.1,
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      range = c(min(pdo$date), Sys.Date())
    ),
    yaxis = list(title = "PDO", fixedrange = TRUE, range = ylim)
  )
```

## TPI (Tripole Index for the Interdecadal Pacific Oscillation)

Reference: <https://psl.noaa.gov/data/timeseries/IPOTPI/>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="R"}
```{r}
tpiURL <- "https://psl.noaa.gov/data/timeseries/IPOTPI/tpi.timeseries.ersstv5.data"

yrsRange <- read.table(
  file = tpiURL,
  header = FALSE, nrow = 1
) |> as.numeric()

tpi <- read.table(
  file = tpiURL, 
  skip = 1, 
  header = FALSE, 
  nrow = diff(yrsRange) + 1
) |> 
  
  as_tibble() |> 
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -V1,
    names_to = "mes",
    values_to = "TPI"
  ) |> 
  
  rename(año = V1) |> 
  
  mutate(
    mes = gsub(x = mes, pattern = "V", replacement = "") |> as.numeric(),
    mes = mes - 1,
    date = paste(año, mes, 1, sep = "-") |> as.Date(),
    TPI_c = cut(
      x = TPI,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 0, Inf),
      labels = c("Frío", "Cálido")
    )
  ) |> 
  
  filter(TPI > -99)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Data"}
```{r}
#| echo: false

tpi |> 
  
  DT::datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print")
    )
  )
```
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| padding: 0px

cols <- setNames(
  object = c("#2e75b5", "#e60000"),
  nm = c("Frío", "Cálido")
)

ylim <- c(
  min(tpi$PDO) |> floor(),
  max(tpi$PDO) |> ceiling()
)

tpi |> 
  
  plot_ly(
    type = "bar",
    colors = cols,
    marker = list(line = list(color = "transparent", width = 0))
  ) |> 
  
  add_bars(
    x = ~date, y = ~TPI, name = "TPI",
    color = ~TPI_c,
    text = ~sprintf(
      fmt = "%s\nTPI: %s\nCategoría: %s",
      format(x = date, format = "%b %Y"),
      TPI, TPI_c
    ),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |> 
  
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    barmode = "relative",
    bargap = 0.1,
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      range = c(min(tpi$date), Sys.Date())
    ),
    yaxis = list(title = "TPI", fixedrange = TRUE, range = ylim)
  )
```

## MEI (Multivariate ENSO Index v2)

Reference: <https://psl.noaa.gov/enso/mei/>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="R"}
```{r}
meiURL <- "https://psl.noaa.gov/enso/mei/data/meiv2.data" 
  
yrsRange <- read.table(file = meiURL, header = FALSE, nrow = 1) |> 
  
  as.numeric()

mei <- read.table(
  file = meiURL,
  skip = 1, 
  header = FALSE, 
  nrow = diff(yrsRange) + 1
) |> 
  
  as_tibble() |> 
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -V1,
    names_to = "mes",
    values_to = "MEI"
  ) |> 
  
  rename(año = V1) |> 
  
  mutate(
    mes = gsub(x = mes, pattern = "V", replacement = "") |> as.numeric(),
    mes = mes - 1,
    date = paste(año, mes, 1, sep = "-") |> as.Date(),
    MEI_c = cut(
      x = MEI,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 0, Inf),
      labels = c("Frío", "Cálido")
    )
  ) |> 
  
  filter(MEI > -999)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Data"}
```{r}
#| echo: false

mei |> 
  
  DT::datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print")
    )
  )
```
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| padding: 0px

cols <- setNames(
  object = c("#2e75b5", "#e60000"),
  nm = c("Frío", "Cálido")
)

ylim <- c(
  min(mei$MEI) |> floor(),
  max(mei$MEI) |> ceiling()
)

mei |> 
  
  plot_ly(
    type = "bar",
    colors = cols,
    marker = list(line = list(color = "transparent", width = 0))
  ) |> 
  
  add_bars(
    x = ~date, y = ~MEI, name = "TPI",
    color = ~MEI_c,
    text = ~sprintf(
      fmt = "%s\nMEI: %s\nCategoría: %s",
      format(x = date, format = "%b %Y"),
      MEI, MEI_c
    ),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |> 
  
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    barmode = "relative",
    bargap = 0.1,
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      range = c(min(mei$date), Sys.Date())
    ),
    yaxis = list(title = "MEI", fixedrange = TRUE, range = ylim)
  )
```
